name: Lewis Herms
background: Self-described 'We The People Guy'. Anti-career-politician candidate focused on accountability and liberty.
statement: Becoming Governor should be hard work because Californians deserve leaders who serve, not rule. As the 'We The People Guy' I believe accountability and liberty must replace politics as usual. Career politicians have had their chance; it's time to restore common sense and leadership that works for the people of California.

positions.government: Accountability and liberty over politics as usual; leaders who serve, not rule; common sense governance

contact.address: 803 Camarillo Springs Rd., 1st Floor, Camarillo, CA 93012
